_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Track data compliance remediation activities, including milestone monitoring, blocker escalation, and closure verification with evidence.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI RC domain. RC-T-005 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AI-T-017 (AI, cosine: 0.375), DA-T-009 (DA, cosine: 0.359).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.0/10 (raw 0.395). No substantive shared vocabulary — relationship is purely semantic. DCWF-only terms [provide, sensitive, support, targeting, time] vs WIDAI-only terms [activities, blocker, closure, compliance, data, escalation] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.875 (P=0.897, R=0.854). P exceeds R by 0.043 — the DCWF element's 5 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 15 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: contradiction-dominant (97.6%). Despite 'Intersects with' classification, the model detects semantic tension between "Provide time sensitive targeting support." and "Track data compliance remediation activities, including milestone monitoring, bl". Indicates these concepts operate in adjacent but distinct professional domains — shared vocabulary, different application context.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.380 ≈ STS 0.395 (gap 0.015). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [none] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 0.0%. Zero substantive shared tokens. The entire relationship is semantic — no lexical trace. DCWF terms: [provide, sensitive, support, targeting, time]. WIDAI terms: [activities, blocker, closure, compliance, data, escalation].

signals.detail: NLI contradiction 97.6% suggests semantic tension between the FDE and matched KSA. The competency domains may be adjacent but not functionally aligned.
